---
title: "Summer School 2026"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Intensive Two-Week Technology Program"
description: "Apply for the chen.ist Summer School 2026, a two-week intensive technology program running August 1-15 at Tech Campus, Bucharest."
date: "2026-08-01"
enddate: "2026-08-15"
location: "Tech Campus, Bucharest"
category: "summer-school"
image: "/assets/images/summer-school.jpg"
registration_date: "2026-05-01"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Summer School</div>
    <h1>Summer School 2026</h1>
    <p>Intensive Two-Week Technology Program</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>August 1-15, 2026</span>
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Tech Campus, Bucharest</span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Register Now</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">50</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2</div><div class="m-nl">Weeks</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">10</div><div class="m-nl">Topics</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Experts</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Event Overview</h2>
    <p>The Summer School 2026 is an intensive two-week program focused on cutting-edge technologies and practical skills development. Perfect for students and professionals looking to enhance their technical capabilities in a condensed, immersive format.</p>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Program Details</h2>
    <p>Over the course of two weeks, participants will:</p>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Engage with industry experts through daily workshops and lectures</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Work on real-world projects in small teams</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Build a comprehensive portfolio of technical work</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Network with peers and potential employers</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Receive personalized mentorship and feedback</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Curriculum</h2>
    <h3>Week 1: Fundamentals & Exploration</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto 2rem;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Monday</h4><div class="up-meta">Opening Ceremony & Introduction / Technology Landscape Overview</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Tuesday</h4><div class="up-meta">Web Development Foundations / Responsive Design Workshop</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Wednesday</h4><div class="up-meta">Backend Architecture / Database Design Principles</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Thursday</h4><div class="up-meta">API Development / Integration Challenges</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Friday</h4><div class="up-meta">Cloud Infrastructure / Deployment Strategies</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <h3>Week 2: Advanced Topics & Project Work</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Monday</h4><div class="up-meta">AI & Machine Learning Intro / Data Analysis Workshop</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Tuesday</h4><div class="up-meta">Applied ML Techniques / Computer Vision Labs</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Wednesday</h4><div class="up-meta">Security Fundamentals / Ethical Hacking Workshop</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Thursday</h4><div class="up-meta">Project Work (Full Day)</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Friday</h4><div class="up-meta">Final Presentations / Closing Ceremony & Networking</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Who Should Attend</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Students pursuing degrees in computer science or related fields</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Early-career professionals looking to expand their skill set</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Career changers transitioning into tech roles</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Educators seeking to update their technical knowledge</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Registration Information</h2>
    <p>Registration required. Early registration is recommended as spaces are limited to 50 participants to ensure a high-quality, personalized experience.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What is the cost to attend?</h4><div class="up-meta">The program fee includes all materials, lunches, and special events. Early bird registrants receive a discount. Limited scholarships are available for students.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Is accommodation provided?</h4><div class="up-meta">Accommodation is not included in the program fee. However, we can assist with recommendations and have partnered with nearby hotels to offer discounted rates.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What level of technical knowledge is required?</h4><div class="up-meta">Participants should have basic programming experience (in any language) and familiarity with web concepts. A pre-course assessment and learning resources will be provided to help you prepare.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Will I receive a certificate?</h4><div class="up-meta">Yes, all participants who complete the program will receive a certificate of completion. Additionally, top performers will receive special recognition.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Can I attend virtually?</h4><div class="up-meta">The program is designed as an in-person experience to maximize hands-on learning and networking. However, select lectures may be available for remote viewing.</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Related Events -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Related Events</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Makers Workshop</h3><p>Hands-on hardware hacking</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3><p>Developing responsible AI systems</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Join Us for Summer School 2026</h2>
    <p>Immerse yourself in an intensive learning experience that will transform your technical skills and career prospects.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Register Interest</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
